---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

# Section

Which part of the documentation needs improvement?

Example:

CHEATSHEET.md

---

# Current Issue

Explain what is unclear or missing.

Example:

Examples for `curl` command are missing.

---

# Suggested Improvement

Explain how the documentation should be improved.

Example:

Add examples for downloading files and APIs.
